title: La FCAC ha coordinat FerticoopGO per aconseguir una fertilització més sostenible
subtitle: S’ha aconseguit demostrar que es poden reduir un 50% les emissions amoniacals i limitar els gasos d’efecte hivernacle
description: A summary of the conclusions from the FerticoopGO pilot project coordinated by the FCAC to achieve more sustainable fertilization and reduce ammonia and greenhouse gas emissions. The project evaluated integrated nitrogen advisory services, nutrient reduction strategies, and emission mitigation techniques including digital tools and field trials across several Catalan cooperatives.
